postData.contentHtml:
In a dramatic display of quick thinking and courage, NBC News senior correspondent Tom Costello became the news himself this week when he rescued a teenager from a horrific car crash on a Maryland highway. What started as a routine drive home for Costello quickly escalated into a life-or-death situation.

Costello witnessed the harrowing incident unfold as a vehicle, estimated to be traveling at a staggering 100 miles per hour, slammed into a concrete barrier. The impact was catastrophic; the car reportedly broke into pieces, flipped, and immediately began to smoke, with flames rapidly engulfing the wreckage.

Without hesitation, Costello pulled over and called 911. Despite the escalating danger, he then approached the mangled, burning car. Inside, he discovered the teenage driver, alive but in a state of shock, complaining of intense pain and numbness in his extremities. The situation grew more perilous by the second as flames began to spread beneath the vehicle.

Fortuitously, an orthopedic surgeon and a nurse also stopped at the scene, offering crucial assistance. Together, the trio worked against the clock, carefully extricating the injured teenager from the fiery deathtrap. Their heroic efforts paid off, as they managed to carry the teen to safety just moments before the car was consumed by a full-blown explosion.

Reflecting on the near-miraculous rescue, Costello expressed his profound relief and disbelief that the teenager survived, extending his gratitude to the medical professionals who assisted. The story has resonated widely, with social sentiment predominantly positive, praising Costello's selfless actions and the remarkable teamwork that saved a young life. This incident serves as a powerful reminder that heroism can emerge in the most unexpected moments, showcasing the extraordinary impact ordinary citizens can have when faced with an emergency.
postData.title: Hero On The Highway: NBC News' Tom Costello Rescues Teen From Fiery Crash
postData.summary: NBC News correspondent Tom Costello turned hero on a Maryland highway, pulling a dazed teenager from a burning car just moments before it exploded. Read the incredible story of courage and quick thinking that captivated the nation.

sources.title: NBC News correspondent helps rescue teen driver from burning car on Capital Beltway
NBC Journalist Pulls Teen From Burning Car After 100 MPH Crash
